name: Eddie Gladden
abstract: Eddie Gladden (December 6, 1937 – September 30, 2003) was an American jazz drummer.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Art Blakey and The Jazz Messengers/ Horace Silver Quintet/ Freddie Hubbard

about_quotes.speaker: Rufus Reid
about_quotes.evidence: So I had to really be strong and Eddie Gladden and I had to really work well together, and when George came in we were one. He demanded it the way he played. And when you heard it, then it became the quartet.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rufus Reid interviewed by Monk Rowe, Atlanta, GA, January 4, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: James Moody
about_quotes.evidence: I had an organ drill with Mickey Tucker [phonetic sp.], Eddie Gladden [phonetic sp.], and I had Eddie Jefferson and me.
about_quotes.doc_title: James Moody — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
